channel.title: Common Table Expression on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Common Table Expression on Remko's Blog

item.title: SQL Query to get the Full Path of an Altiris Job
item.description:
I wanted to query the full path name of an Altiris Job, this sounds easier that it is though.

Consider the following hierarchy:

Now I want to assemble the full Path, in this case: RPA\Getronics\PKG_p007.Citrix_Components.
